behavioral.question: Why do you want to become a Machine Learning Engineer?
Describe a time when you had to learn a new machine learning concept or technology quickly.
Tell me about a time when a machine learning experiment failed. What did you learn from it?
Describe a situation where you had to explain a complex machine learning concept to someone without a technical background.
Tell me about a time when you had to prioritize model quality, project deadlines, and business requirements.
Describe a technical decision involving a machine learning system that you disagreed with. How did you communicate your perspective, and what was the outcome?
Tell me about a time when you significantly improved a machine learning pipeline, model, or engineering workflow.

A production machine learning model begins making incorrect predictions that affect thousands of users. Explain how you would coordinate the technical response, communicate with stakeholders, and restore confidence in the system.

Imagine you discover that a production machine learning model contains a critical issue that should have been detected before deployment. Walk me through how you would handle the situation with your team, management, and users.
